auditIssuesFiled.title: Hermes: CC and stakeholder gap detector - notice when a reply draft omits someone who should stay in the loop
Hermes: Noreply triage hardening - distinguish true system mail from high-signal automated emails that still matter
Hermes: Last-touch recommender - suggest the best next step based on how the thread most recently moved
Hermes: RSVP and deadline extractor - promote hidden date commitments out of email body text
Hermes: Relationship memory snippets - attach a one-line contact context card to important threads
Hermes: Bounce and delivery anomaly monitor - catch when important emails fail to land or get routed strangely
Hermes: Reply-time benchmarking — track how fast Mat responds to each contact tier and surface SLA drift
Hermes: Attachment intelligence — detect contracts, invoices, and signed docs in email attachments and surface proactively
Hermes: Weekly tone learning digest — summarize patterns extracted from Mats Sent folder and surface to Mat for approval
Hermes: Thread sentiment trending — detect when a thread's tone is deteriorating before it escalates
Hermes: Smart unsubscribe queue — weekly batch of newsletters Mat never opens, propose purge
Hermes: Meeting-to-action extractor — parse calendar events and pre-draft follow-up emails
